title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MALAMIG ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY UMIRAY, MUNICIPALITY OF DINGALAN, PROVINCE OF AURORA, TO UMIRAY ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 25664 / 88 OG No. 14, 1848 (April. 6, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7203, March 02, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MALAMIG ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY UMIRAY, MUNICIPALITY OF DINGALAN, PROVINCE OF AURORA, TO UMIRAY ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Malamig Elementary School in Barangay Umiray, Municipality of Dingalan, Province of Aurora, is hereby changed to Umiray Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

NEPTALI A. GONZALES

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on April 5, 1990 and December 11, 1991, respectively.

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR

.

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: March 2, 1992

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
